# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command provided"', description: 'Custom shell command to build the project')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command provided"', description: 'Custom shell command to run tests')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy command provided"', description: 'Custom shell command to deploy the project')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
            }
        }
    }
}
